title: Two NANA Companies Honored By ConocoPhillips
summary: ANCHORAGE, Alaska – NANA is pleased to announce that two of its companies – NANA Construction, LLC and NANA Worley, LLC – have received ConocoPhillips 2020 Supplier Recognition Awards. The two companies are among 16 honored worldwide for exhibiting exceptional leadership in observance of ConocoPhill...

title: Corn planted acreage up 2% from 2020, Soybean acreage up 5% from last year
summary: The U.S. Department of Agriculture's National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS) estimated 92.7 million acres of corn planted in the United States for 2021, up 2% from last year, according to the Acreage report released today.
